title: bstack gate v1
description: Schema for a single gate declared in .control/policy.yaml. Hard gates block agent actions (pattern or runtime_check); soft gates are advisory.

id.description: Stable identifier (G<n>, optionally with a sub-letter for variants — e.g. G4b).

pattern.description: Regex matched against Bash commands by control-gate-hook on PreToolUse. Mutually exclusive with runtime_check.

enforcement.description: Structured enforcement metadata (preferred over top-level pattern in newer gates).

spec.description: Regex, function name, or null for advisory.

severity.description: blocking | informational | advisory canonical; `warn` and `soft` are v1-era synonyms preserved for backward compat. Schema v2 will enforce canonical names only.

measurement.description: How compliance is measured (e.g. `PreToolUse hook blocks matching Bash commands`).

bypass_audit.description: If true, attempts to bypass (e.g. --no-verify) are logged to ~/.bstack/gate-audit.jsonl.

profiles.description: Which profiles activate this gate. Empty = all profiles.
